caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: Strong easterly winds are blowing across Barbados at 22 kt, producing 7.0 ft waves, while Bimini is experiencing winds of 24 kt. I expect an 80% chance of rain in Barbados, with waves and swell periods reaching 11 seconds from the east, impacting cruise ship operations in the Lesser Antilles.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing northwest swells with wave heights reaching 6.2 ft and wind speeds of 14 kt, while Palma de Mallorca is seeing slightly stronger winds at 17 kt. I expect these conditions to persist with a 70% chance of rain in the region, making for a wet and breezy day in the Western Mediterranean ports.
